#begintitle#
static char doc_#apiname#[] = "\
Variable wrapper signature:\n\
	 #name# = get_#name#()\n\
Arguments:\n\
#docstr#";
extern F_MODFUNC(#usemodulename#,#USEMODULENAME#,#realname#,#REALNAME#);
static PyObject *#apiname#(PyObject *capi_self, PyObject *capi_args) {
/*#decl#*/
	if (!PyArg_ParseTuple(capi_args, "")) goto capi_fail;
printf("c: %d\n",F_MODFUNC(#usemodulename#,#USEMODULENAME#,#realname#,#REALNAME#));
	return Py_BuildValue("");
capi_fail:
	return NULL;
zC	{"get_#name#",#apiname#,METH_VARARGS|METH_KEYWORDS,doc_#apiname#},Z	F_MODFUNC)

z2			No definition for variable "%s=>%s". Skipping.
